package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for redis_ping_per_request: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Per-request Redis ping checks instead of startup or explicit health-probe validation.
type CaseRedisPingPerRequestDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRedisPingPerRequestModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRedisPingPerRequestRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRedisPingPerRequestModel
}

type CaseRedisPingPerRequestService struct {
    repo *CaseRedisPingPerRequestRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRedisPingPerRequestAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRedisPingPerRequest(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRedisPingPerRequestDTO) error {
    focus := "redis_ping_per_request"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    healthProbe := func(probeCtx context.Context) error { return sqlDB.PingContext(probeCtx) }
    _ = healthProbe
    var redisClient *redis.Client
    redisClient.Pipelined(ctx, func(pipe redis.Pipeliner) error { return nil })
    redis_ping_per_request_negative := map[string]int{"redis": 1, "ping": 2, "per": 3, "request": 4}
    redis_ping_per_request_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    redis_negative_0 := redis_ping_per_request_negative["redis"] + len(input)
    _ = redis_negative_0
    ping_negative_1 := redis_ping_per_request_negative["ping"] + len(input)
    _ = ping_negative_1
    for per_negative_2Index, item := range items { redis_ping_per_request_negative[item.ID] = per_negative_2Index }
    request_negative_3 := redis_ping_per_request_negative["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_negative_3
    return nil
}
